user_system_path: promote MVP Work Packet Brain after PR #142 rail-only proof is merged or accepted as externally blocked

forbidden_files_raw: No landing work, Stripe, dashboard redesign, Supabase schema, Slack OAuth expansion, live Slack send expansion beyond packet review card proof, Teams/email/calendar expansion, outreach, billing/downgrade work, Dependabot work, connector platform expansion, dashboard task-list inbox-summary behavior, or broad cleanup.

stop_condition: Stop when deterministic packet-brain proof exists, primary receipt and issue #136 ledger receipt are posted, and no live connector, paid model, landing, dashboard, or Slack OAuth expansion occurred.
browser_proof_command: not applicable - deterministic TEST_MODE packet-brain proof only

PR #142 remains rail-only and externally blocked on real Slack button callback proof
Allowed scope is narrow packet-brain files only
Forbidden scope keeps out landing, dashboard, Slack OAuth expansion, Teams/email/calendar, Stripe, auth, Supabase schema, connector platform expansion, and broad cleanup
next_command: Run issue #143 only. Stop after deterministic packet-brain proof and GitHub receipts; do not continue into live connectors or the next seam.
